name: Cuban Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped garlic and green pepper to the skillet. Sauté for about 3 minutes until fragrant and slightly softened.
3. Stir in the cooked black beans, oregano, white vinegar, and minced pimientos. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and let simmer for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
6. Serve the Cuban bean and rice mixture over cooked rice.
Note: This recipe was obtained from Bonnie Bracey (GRWP92A) Prodigy on December 29, 1991.
